concepts.title: Astrobiología
concepts.prompt:
Use case: scientific-educational
Asset type: 16:9 website hero/card image for a Spanish astroengineering atlas.
Primary request: Create a photorealistic cinematic image of the concept Astrobiología.
Mission context: sistemas complementarios. Category: Complementario. Scale: planetaria. Plausibility: actual.
Core idea: La astroingeniería debe saber cuándo construir, cuándo preservar y cuándo mirar mejor.
Visual mental image: Microbios extremófilos bajo hielo, océanos internos y atmósferas analizadas por telescopios.
Mechanism to imply visually: Integra química prebiótica, extremófilos, habitabilidad, biosignatures y mundos como Europa, Encélado, Titán o Marte.
Style: realistic scientific aerospace photography, dark premium SpaceX-inspired visual language, black dominant frame, sober high contrast, physically plausible materials, no poster look, no neon excess.
Composition: wide 16:9, clear readable subject, immersive and contemplative, room for dark overlay text on one side when possible.
Avoid: text, typography, labels, logos, watermarks, flags, brand marks, anime, cartoon, vector art, SVG look, infographic style.
concepts.credit: OpenAI image generation via Codex built-in image_gen.
